reviews.review_description: Just shows a loading screen and never loads on the 3s. You can bring up menu and palette but can’t make any selections. Will be requesting refund.

developer_response.body: Hi there, sorry for any inconvenience caused. However the app requires an internet connection to load initially. App opens directly near the drawing canvas with selected brush and color palette. You can use the joystick from your brush holding hand to change the brush. We are going to release an update which removes the requirement of internet connectivity soon. We use as you can invite another user for a drawing session. Thank you.

Sorry for any inconvenience caused. However the app requires initial network connectivity to load now. We will be releasing a new update which you can use the app without initial internet requirement. Please check with internet on and let us know if the problem persists. Please email us at drawingdesk@4axis.com Thank you.

reviews.review_description: It’s a bit shaky and glitchy but once you get the hang of it it’s very easy to use. Seems to be best if you already have steady hands. Very fun though even if you aren’t good at art. Great price at the moment.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Keep in touch as we will be brining a new update soon ( in days ).

reviews.review_description: A painter program with lots to do.

First, thank you developers for this wonderful coloring app, I love to do more paintings in  VR as just a new learner of painting.   Don't  know how to draw or to paint, and with app I want to learn more.  Please continue to improve the user interface,  so it is easy for beginners to start.   Yes I do recommend this app for everyone to try and have fun.  And more update Please to improve its function and usage.  Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you bryanlo for the feedback. Yes we will be updating the app frequently . Keep in touch with us for more features in coming few months.

reviews.review_description: What a silly low price. Very enjoyable bit glitchy but for the price I’ll suffer them ..could have done with control menu but getting use to it   Try this worth the look 👍👍👍👍

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. Yes we have set the price to the minimum for now until we release our next Major update.

reviews.review_description: I tired to buy using promo code and it wouldn't let me. I cannot select a brush so it's useless to me. To make matters worse, their is no simple way to get a refund for it.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience caused. Anyway we will be making more improvements to the app so brush selection will be improved further. However if you want to request a refund, please send us the details to drawingdesk@4axis.com . Thank you.
Thank you for your awesome review and feedback. We are working on few exciting updates, will update the you soon. 💖💖💖 !!!

reviews.review_description: I got it for free because I bought it a while ago

developer_response.body: Thank you for the feedback. Please share with us about what you think about the update.

reviews.review_description:
Art canvas with very limited basic options. 

Worthy of a download.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Yes we are planning to release an update with more features soon. Keep in Touch !! Join our discord channel to be notified instantly.
https://discord.com/channels/929945531554353212/933961427218214972

reviews.review_description: You should add a paint bucket to quickly fill things in, while also having a ruler or something for straight lines, or outlines for the spray paint, other wise it’s a great game!!

developer_response.body: Thanks a lot for your kind feedback. Yes we are building a new update for Drawing Desk with more features. Will update when we are ready with the release soon.

reviews.review_description: I love the riding game because you can like write whatever you want and I tried to Appletree and it was really good.
Haven't played it yet but looks just like the drawing games that cost 20 bucks
